testcase.name: http_availability [https://brugge-ldes.geomobility.eu/observations]
testcase.failure: HTTPConnectionPool(host='brugge-ldes.geomobility.eu', port=80): Max retries exceeded with url: /observations (Caused by NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='brugge-ldes.geomobility.eu', port=80): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 111] Connection refused"))
testcase.system-err: Checking HTTP availability for: http://brugge-ldes.geomobility.eu/observations Timeout: 10s, Max redirects: 3, Verify SSL: True Availability check failed: HTTPConnectionPool(host='brugge-ldes.geomobility.eu', port=80): Max retries exceeded with url: /observations (Caused by NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='brugge-ldes.geomobility.eu', port=80): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 111] Connection refused"))

testcase.failure: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='brugge-ldes.geomobility.eu', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /observations (Caused by NewConnectionError("HTTPSConnection(host='brugge-ldes.geomobility.eu', port=443): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 111] Connection refused"))

testcase.name: http_availability [https://ldes.telraam-api.net/locations]
testcase.system-out: response_time_s: 0.263 status_code: 301 redirects_to: https://ldes.telraam-api.net/locations OK: HTTP endpoint reachable (redirects to HTTPS)

testcase.name: https_availability [https://ldes.telraam-api.net/locations]
testcase.system-out: response_time_s: 0.411 status_code: 200 OK: HTTPS available, status 200 in 0.411s

testcase.name: certificate_expiry [https://brugge-ldes.geomobility.eu/observations]
testcase.error: Could not retrieve certificate: Connection error: [Errno 111] Connection refused
testcase.system-err: Failed to retrieve certificate: Connection error: [Errno 111] Connection refused

testcase.name: certificate_expiry [https://ldes.telraam-api.net/locations]
testcase.system-out: Checking certificate expiry for: ldes.telraam-api.net:443 expiry: 2026-04-18T15:53:01+00:00 status: ok Certificate valid for 33 more day(s) (expiry: 2026-04-18T15:53:01+00:00)

testcase.name: access_control_allow_origin [http://edan.si.edu/saam/sparql] [lenient]
testcase.system-out: OPTIONS http://edan.si.edu/saam/sparql with Origin: https://vliz.be Followed 1 redirect(s) to https://edan.si.edu/saam/sparql access-control-allow-origin: '*'

testcase.name: access_control_allow_origin [http://vocab.nerc.ac.uk/sparql/sparql] [lenient]
testcase.system-out: OPTIONS http://vocab.nerc.ac.uk/sparql/sparql with Origin: https://vliz.be access-control-allow-origin: '*'

testcase.name: access_control_allow_origin [https://sparql.ifremer.fr/csr/query] [*]

failure.message: access-control-allow-origin does not allow all origins

testcase.system-out: OPTIONS https://sparql.ifremer.fr/csr/query with Origin: https://vliz.be access-control-allow-origin: 'https://vliz.be'

testcase.name: https_redirect [https://sparql.ifremer.fr/csr/query]

failure.message: CORS header missing in redirect chain

testcase.system-out: GET http://sparql.ifremer.fr/csr/query (checking https redirect) HTTP→HTTPS redirect: http://sparql.ifremer.fr/csr/query → https://sparql.ifremer.fr/csr/query (301) access-control-allow-origin at http://sparql.ifremer.fr/csr/query: ''

failure.message: access-control-allow-origin does not allow all origins

testcase.name: https_redirect [https://sparql.ifremer.fr/sextant_seadatanet/query]

failure.message: CORS header missing in redirect chain

testcase.system-out: GET http://sparql.ifremer.fr/sextant_seadatanet/query (checking https redirect) HTTP→HTTPS redirect: http://sparql.ifremer.fr/sextant_seadatanet/query → https://sparql.ifremer.fr/sextant_seadatanet/query (301) access-control-allow-origin at http://sparql.ifremer.fr/sextant_seadatanet/query: ''
